releaseNotes:
- Re-register Ruler/Calibrate command handlers on tab load so they stay active after tab switch
- Pin Job tab, auto-scroll to selected tab, match tab height to toolbar buttons
- Add Ruler overlay — 4 center rulers + perimeter, 1/4" ticks
- Redesign tab layout — fixed width, horizontal scroll, pinned job tab
- Apply contrast, rotation, flip and polarity to exported images
- Sort client list by created date, newest first
- UI improvements — search by client only, default image name, remove save button, auto-finalize drawing at edge
- Redesign ProjectList UI
- Retry/cancel dialog when dependency download fails (no internet)
- Download dependencies from R2, graceful fallback if offline
- Auto-detect and install .NET 8 runtime, warn if VIVIX SDK missing
- Deselect arrow/measure annotations after drawing
- UI: redesign update dialog — clean layout, no scrollbar
- Auto-launch app after install + clean release notes
